facts.description: The final featured volunteer opportunities are the top 3 eligible Sunday shifts after all filters and ranking rules.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept any polished recruitment image that clearly features exactly these three Sunday opportunities. Shift IDs may be omitted; opportunity names must be identifiable and not replaced by unselected shifts.

facts.description: Selected opportunities must be displayed in the rule-based ranking order.
facts.expected_value: Garden Guide before Compost Demo before Welcome Desk
facts.semantic_acceptance: Accept left-to-right, top-to-bottom, numbered cards, or another clear ranking cue as long as the order is Garden Guide, then Compost Demo, then Welcome Desk.

facts.description: Each selected opportunity must show the correct name, start time, and open capacity.
facts.semantic_acceptance: Times may be written in 24-hour or equivalent AM/PM format. Capacity may be labeled open spots, openings, volunteer slots, or similar, but values must be attached to the correct opportunity names.

facts.description: Filtered-out shifts and eligible shifts below the top 3 cutoff must not appear as featured opportunities.
facts.canonical_answer: Only Garden Guide, Compost Demo, and Welcome Desk should be featured.
facts.semantic_acceptance: The image may use generic volunteer imagery, but it must not label or promote any unselected shift as a featured opportunity.

facts.description: Wrong-day, old-window, or internal-audience shifts are excluded.
facts.canonical_answer: Exclude Morning Check-in and Monday Tear-down for day mismatch; exclude Old Fair Info Desk for the wrong event window; exclude Private Donor Tour because audience is internal.
facts.semantic_acceptance: None of these shifts should be featured.

facts.description: Non-open, untrained, and full shifts are excluded.
facts.canonical_answer: Exclude Kids Crafts because trained_lead_ready=false; exclude Evening Cleanup because capacity=0; exclude Archived Booth Setup, Test Greeter Slot, Cancelled Plant Haul, and Draft Mulch Crew because status is not open.
facts.semantic_acceptance: None of these shifts should be featured.

facts.description: Priority-threshold shifts and eligible shifts below the top 3 cutoff are not final featured opportunities.
facts.canonical_answer: Exclude Low Priority Flyer Table because priority 80 equals the exclusive threshold and is not greater than 80. Seed Swap Helper and Water Station pass filters but rank below the top 3 cutoff.
facts.semantic_acceptance: None of these shifts should be promoted as featured opportunities.

calculation_notes: Independent calculation: filter volunteer_shifts.json by day=Sunday, status=open, trained_lead_ready=true, capacity>0, audience=public, event_window=spring_fair_2026, and priority>80 because the priority threshold is exclusive. Eligible rows are V502 Garden Guide (priority 96, start 10:00, capacity 4), V504 Compost Demo (priority 93, start 11:30, capacity 2), V513 Welcome Desk (priority 90, start 09:00, capacity 3), V506 Seed Swap Helper (priority 88, start 13:00, capacity 3), and V507 Water Station (priority 84, start 12:00, capacity 6). Sort by priority descending, then start_time ascending, then capacity descending; there are no ties affecting the top 3. Sorted eligible order is V502, V504, V513, V506, V507. Select top 3, so final featured opportunities are Garden Guide (10:00, 4 open spots), Compost Demo (11:30, 2 open spots), and Welcome Desk (09:00, 3 open spots). Exclusions: V501 Saturday; V503 trained_lead_ready=false; V505 capacity 0; V508 archived; V509 test; V510 cancelled; V511 internal audience; V512 fall_fair_2025 wrong event window; V514 priority 80 equals exclusive threshold; V515 draft; V516 Monday; V506 and V507 are eligible but below top 3.
